product_overview: Mafia Club is a web application for running social Mafia card game nights: an admin dashboard for scheduling, finance and bookings, a leader interface for real-time game sessions, a display view for TVs/projectors, and a mobile join page for players.
core_goals: Schedule and manage club activities and link each activity to a playable game session
Create, join and operate real-time Mafia game sessions with player management and role flows
Manage bookings and have bookings automatically sync session capacity
Provide an admin interface for staff, locations and financial oversight
Show game state on a display screen for players and allow mobile players to join via room code

features.name: Home Page Navigation
features.description: Landing page that routes users to the leader interface or admin panel and reflects leader login state.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View landing page with club branding -> Click leader interface button -> See leader login or dashboard
Navigate to / -> View landing page with club branding -> Click admin panel button -> See admin login page

features.name: Admin Login
features.description: Authenticate into the admin dashboard using username and password.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/login -> Fill username input field -> Fill password input field -> Click login button to submit -> Redirect to /admin on success
Navigate to /admin/login -> Fill username input field -> Fill password input field with incorrect password -> Click login button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Activity Management
features.description: Create, edit and delete scheduled activities which auto-create a linked game session and support offers and pricing.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/activities -> Click add new activity button -> Select date and time -> Select location from dropdown -> Toggle location offers -> Set base price -> Add description -> Submit activity form -> See new activity in the list
Navigate to /admin/activities -> Click activity card to view options -> Click edit activity -> Change date or price -> Submit activity form -> See updated activity in the list
Navigate to /admin/activities -> Click add new activity button -> Leave required field empty -> Submit activity form -> See validation error message
Navigate to /admin/activities -> Click activity card to view options -> Click delete activity -> Confirm deletion -> See activity removed from the list

features.name: Activity Details
features.description: Inspect an activity's financials, bookings, costs and linked game room and perform room unlinking or locking.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/activities -> Click activity card to view details -> View financial summary donut chart -> View attendance distribution chart -> See linked game room card -> Toggle bookings table -> Toggle costs table -> View location info
Navigate to /admin/activities -> Click activity card to view details -> Click unlink on linked game room card -> See linked game room removed from the activity
Navigate to /admin/activities -> Click activity card to view details -> Click lock activity control -> See activity marked as locked

features.name: Booking Management
features.description: Create and manage bookings for activities and have bookings influence session capacity.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/activities -> Click new booking button -> Select activity from dropdown -> Fill name field -> Fill phone number -> Set people count -> Set payment amount -> Mark as paid or free -> Submit booking form -> See booking in bookings list
Navigate to /admin/activities -> Click new booking button -> Fill booking fields -> Submit booking form -> See session maxPlayers updated to include booking people count
Navigate to /admin/activities -> Open bookings list -> Select booking -> Edit booking details -> Submit booking form -> See updated booking in list

features.name: Staff Management
features.description: Manage staff members and assign roles to control access across the system.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/staff -> View staff list -> Click add new staff member -> Fill staff details and assign roles -> Submit staff form -> See new staff member in the list
Navigate to /admin/staff -> View staff list -> Select a staff member -> Edit staff details -> Submit changes -> See updated staff entry
Navigate to /admin/staff -> View staff list -> Select a staff member -> Delete staff member -> Confirm deletion -> See staff removed from list

features.name: Location Management
features.description: CRUD for venue locations and associated offers or packages.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/locations -> View locations list -> Click add new location -> Fill location details -> Add offers to location -> Submit location form -> See new location in list
Navigate to /admin/locations -> View locations list -> Select a location -> Edit location details -> Submit changes -> See updated location entry
Navigate to /admin/locations -> View locations list -> Select a location -> Delete location -> Confirm deletion -> See location removed from list

features.name: Leader Login
features.description: Authenticate leaders into the real-time game management interface.
user_flows: Navigate to /leader/login -> Fill username input -> Fill password input -> Click login button -> Redirect to /leader on success
Navigate to /leader/login -> Fill username input -> Fill password input with incorrect credentials -> Click login button -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Leader — Room Creation & Lobby Management
features.description: Leaders create game rooms, add and manage players in a lobby, and start games when ready.
user_flows: Navigate to /leader -> Click create room -> Fill game name -> Set max players -> Set display PIN -> Optionally link activity -> Submit create room -> See new room in Active Games list

Navigate to /leader -> Open created room from Active Games -> Add player via manual form -> See player appear in Player Grid -> Rename player -> Remove player -> Exclude players for next game -> Start game when player count is at least 6 -> See room transition to role generation phase

features.name: Leader — In-Game Flow
features.description: Execute the Mafia game lifecycle from role generation through game over with leader-driven phase transitions.
user_flows: In an active room with enough players -> Proceed to ROLE_GENERATION -> Proceed to ROLE_BINDING by assigning roles to players -> Enter DAY_DISCUSSION and operate timed speaker queue -> Enter DAY_VOTING and collect votes -> Enter DAY_JUSTIFICATION for the accused to defend -> If votes tie proceed to DAY_TIEBREAKER else proceed to NIGHT -> During NIGHT execute Mafia and citizen night actions -> See MORNING_RECAP that reveals night events sequentially -> See GAME_OVER with winner announced and return to session lobby

features.name: Display Screen
features.description: TV/projector view that shows the current game state and supports match replay.
user_flows: Navigate to /display -> Enter room code or PIN provided by the leader -> See player cards and current game state update in real time
Navigate to /display -> Enter room code or PIN -> View voting results and night recap as they are revealed -> Use match replay controls to view a past match

features.name: Player Join (Mobile)
features.description: Mobile-friendly flow for players to join a session using a room code and appear in the leader's lobby.
user_flows: Receive room code or join link from the leader -> Open the join page provided by the leader -> Enter room code -> Fill player name -> Submit join request -> See confirmation and appear in the leader Player Grid

routes.description: Landing page with navigation to leader and admin interfaces
Admin login page with username and password
Activities list with CRUD, filters, pagination
Activity detail page with financials, bookings, costs, linked game room
Leader interface for game session management
TV display for showing game state
Player join page via room code

user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

user_interactions: Click activity card to view details

user_interactions: Redirect to leader dashboard on success

known_limitations.issue: Google Drive folder creation may fail silently during activity creation
known_limitations.impact: Activity is created but without Drive folder link

known_limitations.issue: Socket.IO reconnection may lose game state context
known_limitations.impact: Leader may need to rejoin the room manually
